title: Display marketing campaigns to clients
excerpt: Hello, our company using Monday to manage projects for our clients which include building monthly advertising plan for social media. We are looking for a way to share the monthly plan in most user friendly way (they just…

posts.author: AnnaZoz (Anna Sinigur)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, our company using Monday to manage projects for our clients which include building monthly advertising plan for social media. We are looking for a way to share the monthly plan in most user friendly way (they just need to see the images, date, platform and content of the plan) and it needs to be responsive. Is it possible from Monday? Or maybe Integrate with other app that can do it? I tried to use diffrent board views (like kanban, cards) but those are not shareable or not responsive. Any tips and insights will be much appreciated. Thank you.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Anna! So sorry for the late reply here! If you’d still like some guidance with this, please send us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to work on this together!
